  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 3 (Phil Hyde) "At least three adult males with Velvets, others thought 4 but we couldn’t confirm this. Great views of a great duck."
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 4 (Matthew Mellor) "At least 4 drakes"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 2 (Muhummed H) "Two drakes in amongst Velvet Scoter off sea wall"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 3 (Noah Bailey) "Three drakes on sea with velvet scoters"
  • 07/07/26 John Muir Way, Musselburgh GB-Scotland 55.95164, -3.02285 2 (Anthony Griffiths) "Both Drakes seen well with Velvet flock"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Rich Bayldon) "Adult drakes with Velvet Scoters"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 3 (Ray O'Reilly) "All drakes"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Mike Barth) "Well reported"
  • 06/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (Sam Shutt) "Known males."
  • 06/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 3 (Graham Megson) "3 present for a few days, seen today"
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 3 (Martin Stervander) "Three drakes. Two sticking together; the other one not far off. In flock with 61 velvet scoters."
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (David Kelly) "All drakes, known birds. Smaller than Velvet with white patches on forehead and nape."
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Morrison's Haven 3 (Thomas Klinner) "."
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (Dylan Daunt) "Drakes continuing"
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (Josh Daunt)
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 3 (Robert Power) "Three at sea adjacent to the lagoons. In a large flock of velvet scoters"
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 2 (Pasi Hyvönen) "Off sea wall"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Becca M) "ID supported by two other birders, one with a scope which made the bird ID much clearer."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 1 (Nils Dittrich) "Continuing bird. In mixed scoter flock, 500m east of the lagoons, far out. Male scoter with white neck."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 2 (Jack Whitelegg) "2 visible on the water"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 2 (Terita Deare) "at least two on sea"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh (General) 3 (Lukasz Pulawski) "Still"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 2 (Steven Grout) "Cutting about with the others."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Sea Wall 3 (Sandeep Ramalingam) "ID'd by Mervin Griffin. White forehead, and back of head. Triangular bill, white base."
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 3 (Jimmy Hair) "3 drakes - white napes and orange bill with white very visible."

Velvet Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta fusca) 100+

  • 08/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons X (Phil Bishop) "Minimum of 40, mostly drakes"
  • 08/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 45 (Nick Addey) "Summer flock. Mostly males."
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 60 (Harry Richardson) "From sea wall"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 60 (David Kelly) "Not rare here"

  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 60 (Noah Bailey) "Flock on sea"

  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 75 (Ray O'Reilly) "Mostly drakes"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 20 (Mike Barth) "Flocks with Common Scoter"
  • 06/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 76 (Sam Shutt) "Not unusual"
  • 06/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 25 (Graham Megson) "Common off Musselburgh lagoons. Summer flock, mostly males."
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 66 (Martin Stervander) "61 in flock with the three surf scoters; 5 in a small group. Mainly males."
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 10 (Kevin Painter) "Not rare here"
  • 05/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 30 (David Kelly) "Not rare here"

  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 20 (Nils Dittrich) "Continuing. Scoter with white wingpanels and white eyemarking"
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons X (Andy Schofield) "Out at sea with common scoters."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh (General) 25 (Lukasz Pulawski) "Not unusual."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Steven Grout) "Frequently observed."
  • 04/07/26 Musselburgh Sea Wall 30 (Sandeep Ramalingam) "Large flock next to a flock of common. Also 3 surf scoters nearby"
  • 03/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) X (Jimmy Hair) "Common at Musselburgh"

White-winged Scoter
More info
eBird
(Melanitta deglandi)

  • 08/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Phil Bishop) "Very brief view imm male. Small nasal bump, dark bill and pale not yellow cuttong edge that appeared pink. Dove as soon as got scope on it.."
  • 08/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Nick Addey) "3cy male with Velvet Scoter flock. IDd on bill profile shape, bump on bill obvious. Eye patch not fully developed."
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) 1 (David Kelly) "Bird first seen this morning, chased this afternoon."
  • 07/07/26 John Muir Way, Musselburgh GB-Scotland 55.95164, -3.02285 1 (Anthony Griffiths) "2cy Drake seen with 2commons videoed"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 1 (Rich Bayldon) "continuing 2s drake fairly close in offshore with 2 Common Scoter."
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh Lagoons 1 (Ray O'Reilly) "Drake in mixed Scoter flock"
  • 07/07/26 Musselburgh--Sea Wall 1 (Mike Barth) "Well reported"
